overall.description: A maritime simulation showing a first-person view from a ship's bridge. The vessel moves steadily through calm seas under overcast skies, with operational navigation displays and a rotating radar visible overhead. The scene maintains a consistent blue-gray atmosphere throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with forward observation deck

agents.ego_description: navigating the ship through open water while monitoring the radar and navigation displays

entered.detail: circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep showing surrounding waters
cyan-colored electronic chart display showing voyage data and map information
blue status display with system metrics and vessel information
forward deck of the vessel with metal railings and navigation lights
metal safety railing along the left side of the bow deck
metal safety railing along the right side of the bow deck
calm sea water extending to the gray horizon under overcast skies

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows the vessel moving steadily through calm waters. Three navigation monitors are visible overhead, with the center radar display showing a continuous rotating sweep. The bow of the ship cuts through the gray ocean under an overcast sky, with no other vessels or land in sight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, focused perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates a vast and solitary expanse of open ocean. It begins with a view of the vessel's bow cutting through calm, gray waters under a heavy overcast sky. As the camera holds its position, the focus shifts slightly to the operational environment overhead, where three navigation monitors are visible. The scene then centers on the middle display, highlighting the rhythmic, continuous rotating sweep of the radar. Finally, the view settles back on the horizon, emphasizing the isolation of the ship amidst the seamless blue-gray atmosphere.
